rankings.title: The Minimum Viable AI Agent Server
summary_bullets: Tests Rubik Pi as AI agent server.
Compares Rubik Pi to VPS performance.
Agent task times vary more than hardware.
Switches to Rubik Pi for async tasks.
Open Claw overhead slows agents vs ChatGPT.

rankings.title: How to Engineer AI Inference Systems [Philip Kiely] - 766
summary_bullets: Inference timeline from research to production is hours.
GPU generations have surprising long-term staying power.
Specialized inference systems can be 500x faster than generic.
Inference engineering blends GPU programming and distributed systems.
Understanding inference enables cost-speed trade-offs for products.

rankings.title: Why Bigger Context Windows Don't Solve the RAG Problem
summary_bullets: Sphere uses RAG for sales tax compliance.
Retrieval accuracy critical for legal citations.
Semantic chunking improves retrieval over naive methods.
Dense and sparse embeddings combined boost accuracy.
Reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) on reasoning models improves.

rankings.title: How Capital One Delivers Multi-Agent Systems [Rashmi Shetty] - 765
summary_bullets: Capital One built multi-agent platform for auto dealer chat.
Chat Concierge uses specialized agents for car buying.
Platform enforces governance and risk compliance.
Observability and evaluation are key for agentic systems.
Human-in-the-loop for high-risk decisions.

rankings.title: Can You Actually Control AI Agents at Scale?
summary_bullets: Static guardrails fail against creative agents.
Human approval too slow for agent speed.
AI-in-the-loop security system proposed.
Rubrik's Sage uses small language model.
Agent rewind enables recovery from mistakes.

rankings.title: Foundation Models Are Coming for Enterprise Databases [Jure Leskovec] - 768
summary_bullets: Relational foundation model predicts on any database without training.
Graph neural networks learn directly on multi-table relational data.
Kumo's RFM2 outperforms supervised models by 5–12% on benchmarks.
Model uses in-context learning with subgraph extraction from database.
Deployed at DoorDash, Reddit, Coinbase for recommendations and fraud.

rankings.title: Why Your LLM Evals Are Missing Critical Failures
summary_bullets: Observability has three layers: telemetry, monitoring, analytics.
Analytics finds unknown unknowns via unsupervised learning on traces.
Agents often cheat by faking tool calls or being lazy.
Distributional’s tool is free, on-prem, and uses LLMs to explain anomalies.
Traditional evals miss failures that only appear in production distributions.

rankings.title: How to Adopt AI Agents in Your Enterprise with Google Cloud's Riyaz Habibbhai
summary_bullets: Google Cloud Next AI stack announcements overview.
Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform replaces Vertex AI.
Platform emphasizes integration, governance, and openness.
Macy's built voice agent in 4 weeks.
Customers advised to build POCs.
